functions.name: project_dir
functions.description: 返回项目目录路径字符串（旧版兼容）

functions.name: _generate_session_name
functions.description: 生成 Zellij session 名称：zchat-{name}

functions.name: generate_default_config
functions.signature: def generate_default_config(name: str, server: str = '127.0.0.1', ...) -> str
functions.description: 生成默认配置 TOML 文本

functions.name: create_project_config
functions.description: 创建项目目录并写入 config.toml + 空 routing.toml

functions.name: list_projects
functions.description: 返回排序的项目名列表

functions.name: get_default_project
functions.description: 从 ~/.zchat/default 读取默认项目名

functions.name: set_default_project
functions.description: 写入默认项目名到文件

functions.name: resolve_project
functions.signature: def resolve_project(explicit: str | None = None) -> str | None

functions.name: load_project_config
functions.description: 加载并验证项目 config.toml（拒绝旧格式，填充默认值）

functions.name: state_file_path
functions.description: 返回项目 state.json 路径

functions.name: set_config_value
functions.signature: def set_config_value(name: str, key: str, value: str)
functions.description: 通过 dotted key 设置项目配置值（含类型转换）

functions.name: normalize_channel_name
functions.description: 确保 channel 名以 # 开头
